cargo.libssh-rs: Rust bindings are MIT, but OpenXTerm enables vendored libssh through libssh-rs-sys; release notices must cover native libssh LGPL obligations.
cargo.libssh-rs-sys: Build helper can vendor native libssh; Cargo metadata does not fully describe native libssh licensing.
cargo.openssl-src: Vendored OpenSSL source requires Apache-2.0 LICENSE/NOTICE review for binary artifacts.
cargo.serialport: MPL-2.0 dependency is acceptable for API use but remains notice/review-sensitive.

nativeNotices.name: libssh
nativeNotices.source: vendored through libssh-rs/libssh-rs-sys when the Cargo feature `vendored` is enabled
nativeNotices.review: Cargo metadata reports the Rust crates, not the full native libssh source tree. Keep THIRD_PARTY_LICENSES.md and release artifacts aligned.

nativeNotices.name: OpenSSL
nativeNotices.source: vendored through openssl-src when `vendored-openssl` is enabled
nativeNotices.review: OpenSSL LICENSE and NOTICE handling must be checked before binary releases.
